hook_text: 3 Omani companies. 1 WPS rejection between them in 12 months. Here's what they have in common.
body:
Selected from our active client base — anonymized but real:

Company A: Logistics. 87 employees. 3 nationalities.
Company B: Retail. 142 employees. 6 nationalities.
Company C: Construction. 61 employees. Subcontractor mix.

Combined WPS submissions in 2025: 36.
Total rejections: 1 (Company B, February — IBAN format error, resubmitted same day).

Industry average WPS rejection rate in Oman: ~18% per submission cycle.

What they share:
- All three validated IBAN fields against bank formatting rules before export
- All three had MOL-reference numbers auto-verified at payroll lock
- All three ran a pre-submission checklist flagging the 7 most common rejection causes
- All three exported directly from SmartPRO Hub — no reformatting, no copy-paste

One rejection in 36 submissions. 97.2% first-pass success.

The industry isn't bad at payroll. It's bad at the last 10 minutes before submission.

---

What's your WPS first-pass rate? Drop a number in the comments.
rejected_reason: pre-PR#12 backlog purge — queue hygiene 2026-07-15 (regenerate via corrected pipeline)
